description: Implement the core ActivityPub layer: actor model, HTTP signatures (sign + verify), WebFinger endpoint, NodeInfo endpoint, inbox processing (Follow/Like/Create/Announce/Delete), outbox publishing with signatures, server endpoint mounting, and delivery queue with retry. Also implement the Matrix bridge (bridge-bot and room-mapper) and federation moderation (instance blocklist/allowlist). Every source file gets a corresponding .test.ts file.
steps: Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/actor.ts - Actor class that generates Ed25519 keypairs (using node:crypto), builds AS2 actor objects with id, type, preferredUsername, inbox, outbox, followers, following, publicKey fields. Export ActorSchema (zod) and Actor class.
Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/actor.test.ts - Tests: actor creation generates valid keypair, actor serializes to valid AS2 JSON, public key is in correct format.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/http-signatures.ts - Functions: signRequest(privateKey, keyId, method, url, headers, body) returns signed headers with RSA-SHA256 or Ed25519 digest. verifySignature(publicKey, method, url, headers, body) returns boolean. Use node:crypto sign/verify. Include header parsing for 'Signature' header (keyId, algorithm, headers, signature fields).
Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/http-signatures.test.ts - Tests: sign then verify roundtrip succeeds, tampered body fails verification, missing headers fail, different algorithms work.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/webfinger.ts - WebFinger handler: given a query like acct:user@domain, returns JRD with subject, links (self link to actor URL with type application/activity+json). Export WebFingerHandler class and WebFingerResponseSchema.
Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/webfinger.test.ts - Tests: valid acct query returns correct JRD, invalid resource returns error, links contain correct rel and type.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/nodeinfo.ts - NodeInfo handler: returns /.well-known/nodeinfo with links to nodeinfo/2.1, and the nodeinfo document itself with software name/version, protocols (activitypub), usage stats (users, posts). Export NodeInfoHandler class.
Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/nodeinfo.test.ts - Tests: nodeinfo response has correct schema version, software name present, protocols include activitypub, usage stats are numbers.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/inbox.ts - InboxProcessor class: receives Activity objects, validates them, dispatches by type. Handles Follow (creates follower relationship, sends Accept back), Like (records like), Create (stores remote content), Announce (records boost), Delete (marks content as deleted). Uses moderation check before processing. Export InboxProcessor and ActivitySchema.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/inbox.test.ts - Tests: Follow activity creates relationship and returns Accept, Like records correctly, Create stores note, Announce records boost, Delete marks deleted, blocked instance activity is rejected.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/outbox.ts - OutboxPublisher class: takes an activity, signs it using http-signatures, queues for delivery. Methods: publish(activity, recipients) which signs and enqueues. Export OutboxPublisher.
Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/outbox.test.ts - Tests: publish signs the activity with valid signature, publish enqueues to delivery queue, activity has correct type and actor fields.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/delivery-queue.ts - DeliveryQueue class wrapping @quant/queue TypedQueue pattern. Defines DeliveryJobSchema (zod) with fields: activityId, recipientInbox, payload, attempt, maxAttempts. Implements exponential backoff retry logic (delay = baseDelay * 2^attempt). Export DeliveryQueue class and schema.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/delivery-queue.test.ts - Tests: job enqueued with correct schema, retry calculates exponential backoff correctly, max attempts respected, failed delivery re-enqueues with incremented attempt.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/server.ts - FederationServer class that mounts routes: /users/:username (actor), /users/:username/inbox (POST), /users/:username/outbox (GET), /users/:username/followers (GET), /users/:username/following (GET). Uses a simple route-handler map pattern (no Express dependency - just handler functions that take request/response objects). Export FederationServer.

Create packages/federation/src/activitypub/server.test.ts - Tests: server registers all expected routes, actor route returns valid actor JSON, inbox route calls InboxProcessor, outbox route returns activities collection.

Create packages/federation/src/matrix/bridge-bot.ts - MatrixBridgeBot class: maps Quant DMs to Matrix rooms. Methods: onQuantMessage(msg) sends to mapped Matrix room, onMatrixMessage(event) sends to mapped Quant conversation. Maintains user mapping. Export MatrixBridgeBot.

Create packages/federation/src/matrix/bridge-bot.test.ts - Tests: Quant DM is forwarded to correct Matrix room, Matrix message is forwarded to correct Quant conversation, unmapped users get room created.

Create packages/federation/src/matrix/room-mapper.ts - RoomMapper class: maps 1:1 Quant conversations to Matrix DM rooms, group conversations to Matrix rooms. Methods: getMatrixRoom(quantConvId), getQuantConversation(matrixRoomId), createMapping(quantConvId, matrixRoomId, type). Export RoomMapper.
Create packages/federation/src/matrix/room-mapper.test.ts - Tests: 1:1 conversation maps to DM room, group maps to room, bidirectional lookup works, duplicate mapping throws.

Create packages/federation/src/moderation.ts - FederationModeration class: manages instance blocklist and allowlist. Methods: blockInstance(domain), allowInstance(domain), isBlocked(domain), isAllowed(domain), checkActivity(activity) returns boolean (rejected if from blocked instance). Allowlist mode: if allowlist has entries, only those are permitted. Export FederationModeration and schemas.

Create packages/federation/src/moderation.test.ts - Tests: blocked instance is rejected, allowed instance passes, allowlist-only mode rejects unlisted, activity from blocked domain rejected, empty lists allow all.
Update packages/federation/src/index.ts to barrel-export all public APIs from activitypub/, matrix/, and moderation modules.
Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run in packages/federation to confirm all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: WebFinger endpoint returns valid JRD for user query
HTTP signatures sign/verify correctly with roundtrip test
Inbox processes Follow activity and creates relationship
Outbox publishes Create activity with valid signature
Matrix bridge maps DM to room and back
Instance blocklist rejects activities from blocked instances
Delivery queue retries on failure with exponential backoff
All source files have corresponding .test.ts files
NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run passes for all federation tests
TypeScript strict mode (no any types used)
verification: Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run' from workspace root and confirm all federation tests pass
Run 'npx tsc --noEmit' in packages/federation to confirm typecheck passes
findings: All 45 tests pass across 11 test files. TypeScript strict typecheck passes with no errors. Prettier formatting applied by lint-staged pre-commit hook. Used NODE_OPTIONS="" for all npx/vitest commands as documented. No external dependencies needed beyond what was already installed.
